scope: D2 P2/Low residue + CHANGELOG/docs sync + CI matrix expand + mypy strict beachhead expand + public API surface decision + cross-package underscore-import meta-test + cupy SoftBan doc + AP5 validation

D2_10_S75_ci_macos_row.notes: macos-latest x py3.11 row added with dedicated no-cov path; also-skips linux_only + windows_only markers

D2_11_S76_sklearn_matrix_py313_windows.notes: Added py3.13/ubuntu/sklearn1.8.0 row + py3.11/windows/sklearn1.7.2 row via matrix.include

D2_14_mypy_strict_expand.notes: Second strict-mode beachhead: mlframe.utils.safe_pickle (162 LOC). Verified mypy --disallow-untyped-defs --disallow-incomplete-defs --warn-return-any --no-implicit-optional passes clean. Other utils modules (eda, experiments, misc, text, nan_safe) excluded due to legacy `from typing import *` patterns + numpy-return-any.

D2_12_S77_docs_sync.notes: Added audit summary doc + AP12 calibration policy guide + AP13 honest_diagnostics guide. Cross-linked to existing docs (baseline_diagnostics_guide, dummy_baselines_guide). Aggregate CHANGELOG entry covers 9 waves + 4 monolith carves + 12/14 APs DONE + 3 dropped.

D2_6_S71_public_api_decision.notes: Adopted deep-import convention (existing pattern). Top-level __init__.py docstring rewritten to explicitly document the deep-import path with 8 concrete examples. mlframe.training __init__.py already had complete docstring + __all__ surface; not modified.

D2_17_underscore_meta_test.notes: New cross-package generalisation of existing test_no_production_underscore_imports.py (which scoped to training.core._* only). Frozen ALLOWLIST baseline of 9 pre-existing offenders (11 raw occurrences across 12 import sites in 9 files). Two test functions: test_no_new_underscore_imports_cross_package (regression sensor) + test_underscore_imports_allowlist_is_not_stale (monotone-shrink enforcement). Verified passing: 2 passed in 8.52s.

D2_21_cupy_softban_doc.notes: Documented the CPython sys.modules[name]=None negative-cache semantics + cited CPython 3.12/3.13 _bootstrap.py source path. Rejected the _SoftBan proxy alternative with explicit reason: caller-side try/except ImportError is already in place at 22 GPU call sites, so the None primitive is the cheapest poisoning option.

D2_18_conftest_dedup_verify.notes: Re-read tests/conftest.py:120-185. fast_only/slow_only/no_xdist registered in pyproject.toml only; conftest only registers fuzz + biz_transformer (conftest-private markers). Explicit reference to 'audit D2 P2 #18' in the comment block. No regression from W5B fix.

AP5_numba_coverage_validation.notes: Confirmed via gh workflow list that numba-coverage-nightly is active (workflow id 282633103). Checked latest nightly run (id 26388114573, scheduled 2026-05-25T07:06:46Z) -- exit code 2, 2 failures: (1) src/mlframe/feature_engineering/mps.py:129 IndexError (real prod bug surfaced by NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT=1 strict bounds checking), (2) test_biz_njit_poly_eval_3x_faster_than_numpy_at_n2k AssertionError (predicted Risk #2 in proposal: perf-floor test trips because @njit kernel runs as plain Python under no-JIT). Both flagged for Wave 11 backlog with explicit fix directions: mps.py:129 bounds check + skipif(NUMBA_DISABLE_JIT==1) gate on perf-floor biz_value tests.
